Thomas Rivera, Esq. (415.995.6493; TRivera@hansonbridgett.com) of Hanson Bridgett LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Discussed re: Proposed order to track the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DADO, LLC INCORRECTLY IDENTIFIED AS D/B/A Defendant Dado, LLC's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint

Defendant's unopposed "motion for leave to file cross-complaint" is granted.

Order is signed.
